title: C88 — The Parity Cube: the stella octangula's two tetrahedra are the even/odd parity classes…

story.text:
# C88
**The Parity Cube: the stella octangula's two tetrahedra are the even/odd parity classes of the cube's vertices; the canonical seat of neg/bnot at 3-bit scale; {0,1}⁶ = {0,1}³ × {0,1}³ gives each agent a cube, with the C85 pair map as candidate factoring**

*Confidence:* ~30% · *Status:* active · registered Run 5, 2026-06-10 · *Register:* core
*Home:* privacy_value_v6_draft.md Part V §V.4

Band VIII · Registered during the V6 runs

story.title: Tome VIII Act 04 — The Gap Is β
story.text: a tome act that cites this conjecture.
